races.name: Australian GP
races.note: Russell opened 2026 from pole. Leclerc split the Mercedes. Hamilton P6 — still finding his feet in red.
races.egg: Back-to-back poles to open the season. George Russell is in a different gear.

races.name: Chinese GP
races.rest: 4. Leclerc · 5. Bearman · 6. Norris · DNF: Both McLarens
races.note: Antonelli pole to win — 2nd youngest winner ever. Hamilton's first Ferrari podium in 26 starts.
races.egg: Kid's not here to make up the numbers. Kimi Antonelli just announced himself.

needles: Hamilton waited 26 races for a Ferrari podium.
Verstappen — P8. Zero podiums. Red Bull adrift.
McLaren double DNF in China. Defending champions.
Russell and Antonelli. Same team. 4 points apart. This gets ugly by Monaco.
2nd youngest winner in F1 history. The kid didn't blink.
